preamble: The shift from the diphthong [ai] to [ie] involves a change in the starting and ending points of the vowel movement, typically raising the first element and shifting the second.
sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Languages: A Historical Introduction. Cambridge University Press.
